title: Databayt Quiet Wizard — Step Catalog
description: Documentation-style catalog of every step the wrappers run. Wrappers currently hardcode these; future versions may read from this file. Source of truth for what each platform installer does.

act1_preflight.description: Scan first (lib/agents.sh), then dialog ONLY what detection can't answer — usually 1-2 dialogs on a machine with any history, 5 on a bare one

steps.note: Detect-first: prints the system + agent scan table before anything installs; agents_detect_json feeds the auto-skips below

steps.prompt: Do you have a GitHub account?
Have you accepted the databayt org invite?
steps.note: Pre-flight check — Phase 3 fails fast if invite not accepted (gh api user/memberships/orgs/databayt)

steps.prompt: Anthropic — company account (HR shares credentials + sends OTP).
steps.autoSkipWhen: claude CLI installed AND ~/.claude.json exists (already signed in)
steps.note: Company account — HR sends OTP via Slack/email. Install proceeds in parallel; teammate finishes sign-in (Claude Code first-run + mobile/Desktop) once OTP arrives. Act 3 manual finishing surfaces the sign-in dialog again at end.

steps.prompt: Where do you want databayt org repos saved?
steps.autoSkipWhen: ~/kun and ~/hogwarts already exist at home root
steps.note: Custom branch falls back to a text input asking for the absolute path

steps.prompt: Which agents should this machine get?
steps.note: Maps to --agents=all|code,desktop,agy,opencode,openclaw. Launchers: c/a/o/claw. opencode bypass is config-level (permission: allow); OpenClaw is an assistant gateway, not a coding CLI

removedAsOf2026_05_25: welcome — install starts immediately on paste
role — every machine gets the full config; backends default to 'engineer'
gitName + gitEmail — auto-derived from `gh api user` after Phase 3 auth (name = .name||.login, email = <login>@users.noreply.github.com); falls back to $(whoami) in quiet mode + no gh
gistId — install completes without; teammate runs secrets.sh manually later (final dialog reminds them)
proMax — Act 3 Desktop dialogs now gate on /Applications/Claude.app existing instead
hogwartsDev — defaults to off; --hogwarts-dev / -HogwartsDev CLI flag still opts in

act2_silentBatch.description: Run the 8-phase platform backend in --quiet/-Quiet mode

phases.label: System Foundation — build tools, git, Node 24, pnpm, gh CLI
GitHub — SSH key, gh auth, upload key, auto-set git identity from gh api user, verify databayt org membership + SSH push
Clone Repositories — kun + (engineer: hogwarts, codebase, all org repos)
Agents — c/a/o/claw fleet per --agents selection (Claude Code + Desktop, Antigravity, opencode, OpenClaw)
Hogwarts — pnpm install, prisma, seed, build (engineer only)

act2_silentBatch.progressMarker: PROGRESS:N/8:label streamed on stderr — wrappers parse for notifications

act3_manualFinishing.description: Deep-link dialogs only when human is unavoidably in the loop

steps.note: Opens browser, blocks until success — no dialog needed
Company account — credentials + OTP from HR. Non-blocking: install completes regardless. If HR's OTP hasn't arrived, teammate runs `claude` after install.

steps.prompt: Sign in to Claude Desktop (company creds + OTP from HR)
(Optional) OpenClaw daemon — interactive setup: openclaw onboard --install-daemon
steps.gate: openclaw installed AND openclaw selected in agents
steps.note: Never run headless — OpenClaw's guided onboarding wires chat channels interactively

steps.prompt: Install Claude Code plugin in WebStorm (optional)

stateFile.behavior: On wizard start, read state file. If present, skip already-completed steps.

claudeDesktop.linux: n/a — Claude Desktop not on Linux
